tables.description: The dataset provides medical history information, including presence/absence of a diagnosis of cataract, dementia, diabetic retinopathy, hypothyroidism, PAD, resistent hypertension, and red/white blood cell count abnormalities, blood test results, lipid values, and others.

variables.name: ACTIVITY_EXERCISE_HRS_PER_WK
variables.description: The type or amount of exercise performed in a typical week in hours

variables.name: AGE_DIABETIC_RETINOPATHY
variables.description: Age at diagnosis of the farthest progression of diabetic retinopathy

variables.name: AGE_EXUDATIVE_RETINOPATHY
variables.description: The age of the subject at the time of the worst detected exudative retinopathy.

variables.name: AGE_FIRST_HYPOTHYROIDISM
variables.description: Age at first hypothyroidism indication?

variables.name: AGE_LAST_EYE_EXAM
variables.description: Age at most recent CPT recorded eye exam

variables.name: AGE_MACULAR_EDEMA
variables.description: Age at diagnosis of diabetic macular edema

variables.name: AGE_RETINAL_ISCHEMIA
variables.description: The age of the patient at the diagnosis of retinal ischemia.

variables.name: BMI_MAX_BEFORE_HEIGHT_STUDY_EXCLUSIONS
variables.description: Subject's body mass index maximum value, calculated using measures collected before the age at which the first height study exclusion occurred

variables.name: BMI_MAX_BEFORE_LIPID_STUDY_EXCLUSIONS
variables.description: Subject's body mass index maximum value, calculated using measures collected before the age at which the first lipid study exclusion occurred

variables.description: Subject's body mass index median value, calculated using measures collected before the age at which the first lipid study exclusion occurred

variables.name: BMI_MEDIAN_HDL_CHOLESTEROL_MEASUREMENT
variables.description: Median BMI at HDL results

variables.name: BMI_MIN_BEFORE_HEIGHT_STUDY_EXCLUSIONS
variables.description: Subject's body mass index minimum value, calculated using measures collected before the age at which the first height study exclusion occurred

variables.name: BMI_MIN_BEFORE_LIPID_STUDY_EXCLUSIONS
variables.description: Subject's body mass index minimum value, calculated using measures collected before the age at which the first lipid study exclusion occurred
